picks.analysis: Kansas City's home-field advantage and Mahomes' consistency against Baltimore make this a strong lean. Sharp money has moved this line from -2.5.
Both offenses upgraded in the offseason. Expect a shootout with two of the NFL's best QBs healthy heading into Week 1.
Best value on the board this week. San Francisco owns the all-time series edge and returns a healthy backfield. Fade the Rams at home early in the season.
Early-season offenses tend to be sluggish. Buffalo's defense is elite and Miami's new OC is still installing the system. Under has hit in 6 of last 8 Bills-Dolphins openers.
Contrarian value play. Philly is overvalued in early markets. Getting Cowboys at even money in a divisional game is worth a small unit.
